_comment: Balancer V2 Vault real-tx corpus. Source: Etherscan v2 txlist for Vault 0xBA12222222228d8Ba445958a75a0704d566BF2C8 on chains 1/42161/137, latest ~100 tx/chain, selector-agnostic, pulled 2026-05-30. Covered today: swap (0x52bbbe29) -> pass/amm via balancer/v2/vault-swap@1.0.0; setRelayerApproval (0xfa6e671d) -> pass/permission via balancer/v2/vault-set-relayer-approval@1.0.0. Remaining uncovered Vault fns are soft no_declarative_v3_mapper, pinned here as expect=error to lock the gap; flip to expect=pass + expect_domain when the corresponding manifest lands. Remaining fns + how to add: batchSwap 0x945bcec9 (TIER B - cross-array assets[swaps[i].assetInIndex], named in array_emit.rs as canonical fallback); exitPool 0x8bdb3913 & joinPool 0xb95cac28 (need dynamic array zip + userData enum-tag decode for faithful LP action). Zero hard decoder failures in the original 300-tx sample. Balancer V3 Router v2 direct swap samples added 2026-06-01 from Dune queries 7623992 (Base exact-in) and 7624000 (Base exact-out): swapSingleTokenExactIn 0x750283bc and swapSingleTokenExactOut 0x94e86ef8 both route to amm. Etherscan mainnet bulk replay on 2026-06-01 showed permitBatchAndCall 0x19c6989f frequently wraps deferred liquidity calls plus Permit2 side effects; pinned as expect=error until that wrapper is faithfully modeled.

transactions.source: etherscan:mainnet:v3-router:txlist-desc-10000 | NOW COVERED: multicall_recurse resolves the 0x724dba33 child via balancer_v3:pool_tokens (pool 0x1b66d6e129e38a54e917734e58cbdfa1968a14c3); flipped error->pass 2026-06
transactions._note: permitBatchAndCall whose sole multicallData child is addLiquidityProportional (DEFERRED, no manifest); multicall_recurse resolves no leg → fail-closed. Demonstrates a permitBatchAndCall that cannot be decoded (all-deferred children).
hand-edge: V3 single-token liquidity has near-zero direct tx (appears mainly as permitBatchAndCall child); synthetic valid calldata to pin the semantic decode.
